title: Bare PVP
description: Pure optimizations and mods for PVP, this modpack will provide high performance with PVP utilities.
body:
Bare PVP is a modpack that's different from a lot of others. I focused on 2 goals: First, optimization, and second, PVP. By using mods like Sodium and Lithium, users can enjoy high FPS gameplay, and with mods like Marlow's Crystal Optimizer, the PVP experience is enhanced.

To give feedback, join the Discord!

YOUTUBE CHANNEL: https://youtube.com/@zephyrus-gaming
OPTIMIZED UTILITIES: https://modrinth.com/modpack/optimized-utilities

UPDATES: I will update Bare PVP mainly when one of 2 things happen. 1. A new version comes out. 2. The mods used are several versions behind. This is to ensure that users can have the best possible experience, while the project is not being updated every 2 days.

MOD ATTRIBUTION: Since there are a ton of mods included in this modpack, and it'd be way too long to type them all here, head to [the versions page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bare-pvp/versions), select the version you want to download, and you'll be able to see all mods I used.
